360 Video Booth

Capture Every Angle, Keep Every Memory

Price
From $249
Status
Available Now
Category
Video Booth
Duration
1 hour minimum
Use type
Dry-use

Our 360 Video Booth creates a short slow-motion video of guests standing on a platform while the camera rotates around them. Guests can pose, dance, smile, or celebrate while the booth records a smooth 360-style video. The final result is a digital slow-motion video made for sharing.

This is not a traditional printed photo booth. It is a video experience, also commonly called a 360 photo booth, where guests receive a slow-motion digital video instead of printed photos.

An operator is included to run the booth, guide guests, provide props, and help keep the line moving during the rental.

Setup and takedown included. Indoor setup preferred; outdoor setup available on flat, dry surfaces and weather permitting. Power access required.

360 Video Booth rental for weddings, graduations, birthdays, school events, community events, corporate events, church events, and fundraisers in Nova Scotia.

Features

  • 360° immersive video experience
  • Automatic rotating camera arm
  • RGB ring lighting
  • Remote-controlled operation
  • Instant digital sharing and delivery
  • Professional setup and takedown included

Best For

  • Weddings
  • Graduations
  • Birthday Parties
  • School Events
  • Community Events
  • Corporate Events
  • Church Events
  • Fundraisers

Specs

  • 26.8” 360 platform
  • Rotating camera arm
  • RGB ring light
  • Remote control
  • Setup and takedown included
  • Standalone: $249 for 1 hour — additional time: $125/hour
  • Add-on with any inflatable or package: $199 for 1 hour — additional time: $70/hour

Setup Notes

  • Indoor setup preferred
  • Outdoor setup available on flat, dry surfaces and weather permitting
  • Power access required (standard household outlet)
  • Clear, level setup area required
